dynamicRules.explanation: Allowed click-through targets are intentionally capped to the union of the two root players plus each root player’s top-5 most-played teammates from the fetched Riot sample.

championIdentity.classRead: Fighter / Assassin looks like the comfort lane, while Assassin / Fighter has been converting the best results.

signals.label: damage share gravity
signals.description: soaks up a bigger slice of team damage responsibility than typical participants in the same matches.

signals.label: damage throughput
signals.description: converts game time into champion damage better than the match median.

signals.label: objective theft pressure
signals.description: has actual steal events in the fetched sample, so the page can call it out without guessing.

signaturePlay.note: signals are only surfaced when the match payload exposes the metric and the sample is big enough to compare against actual lobby peers.

radar.note: radar axes are average within-lobby percentiles, scaled 0-100.

premadeSynergy.note: counts refer to how many of the player’s current top-10 teammates also appeared on the same team in that match.
premadeSynergy.read: the premade split is mostly descriptive here, not enough to call a giant performance gap.

playtimePersonality.read: Evening (6p-12a) has been the cleanest performance band so far, while afternoon (12p-6p) has been the shakier one.

rows.caution: enough repeat exposure to be worth noticing
enough repeat exposure to be worth noticing

worstEnemy.note: enemy rows are correlation reads from the fetched match window, not a claim of a universal matchup truth.

records.note: all records below come from the fetched Riot history window of 220 matches, not guaranteed full lifetime history.

network.note: node map includes the root player plus top-10 teammates; edge thickness scales with how often that pair showed up on the same team in the fetched sample.

chuahpstix#na1.read: fetched 220 League matches in the current Riot-visible window, from Nov 14, 2024, 10:51 PM through Feb 26, 2026, 12:14 AM. This is overwhelmingly an ARAM-heavy sample, so the identity read is about fight patterns and champion comfort more than lane-phase macro.
